system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonghop_xuat_hopchat_amount","body":"

CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_TONGHOP_XUAT_HOPCHAT_AMOUNT]
(
	@tungay date,
	@denngay date
)
AS
-- LẤY THÔNG TIN XUẤT HỖN HỢP
SELECT B.madonhang, B.buocson, SUM(B.soluong) AS soluong_xuat 
INTO #HONHOP_XUAT
FROM tr_tonghop_xuat_hopchat A
	INNER JOIN tr_tonghop_xuat_hopchat_chitiet B ON A.id = B.id_tonghop
WHERE A.ngaythang BETWEEN @tungay AND @denngay
GROUP BY B.madonhang, B.buocson

-- THÔNG TIN ĐƠN HÀNG THEO NGÀY XUẤT HỖN HỢP
SELECT A.order_number, B.item_number, B.order_qty
INTO #DONHANG
FROM tr_order A
	INNER JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number
WHERE A.f_cancelled = 'N' AND B.f_cancelled = 'N'
	AND EXISTS (SELECT madonhang FROM #HONHOP_XUAT WHERE A.order_number = madonhang)
	AND ISNULL(B.khongtinhson, 0) = 0

--SELECT masp, buoc, mact, soluong,
--	phantram = CASE WHEN SUM(soluong) OVER (PARTITION BY masp, buoc) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(soluong / SUM(soluong) OVER (PARTITION BY masp, buoc), 4) END
--FROM tr_dinhmuc_son3 A
--WHERE A.makhuvuc = 'SON' AND A.masp = 'CRL-DW-5-03-R_AKZ010_AA'

SELECT madonhang = C.order_number, 
	A.buoc, A.mact,
	khoiluong = SUM(A.soluong * B.metvuong)
INTO #DINHMUC_SON3
FROM tr_dinhmuc_son3 A
	INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong B ON A.masp = B.masp AND A.matson = B.matson
	INNER JOIN #DONHANG C ON A.masp = C.item_number
GROUP BY C.order_number, A.buoc, A.mact

SELECT a.madonhang, A.mact, c.mota, a.buoc, 
	soluong_xuat = SUM(B.soluong_xuat * phantram),
	dongia = SUM(B.soluong_xuat * phantram * c.dongia)
FROM (
	SELECT A.madonhang, A.buoc, A.mact, A.khoiluong,
		phantram = CASE WHEN SUM(a.khoiluong) OVER (PARTITION BY a.madonhang, a.buoc) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(a.khoiluong / SUM(a.khoiluong) OVER (PARTITION BY a.madonhang, a.buoc), 4) END
	FROM #DINHMUC_SON3 A
) A INNER JOIN #HONHOP_XUAT B ON A.madonhang = B.madonhang AND A.buoc = B.buocson
	INNER JOIN tr_material C ON A.mact = C.mavt
GROUP BY a.madonhang, A.mact, c.mota, a.buoc
ORDER BY A.madonhang, A.buoc, C.mota

DROP TABLE #DONHANG, #HONHOP_XUAT, #DINHMUC_SON3;




","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_tonghop_xuat_hopchat","dbo.tr_tonghop_xuat_hopchat_chitiet"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-window","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
